<ComingSoonCallout />

<Note> This page is not reviewed or endorsed by the Livepeer team. It is a community effort to help GPU providers find pools to join. Please do your due diligence before joining any pool. See [Join a Pool](../quickstart/join-a-pool) for more information. </Note>

Una página para operadores de pools donde se describen sus pools, cómo unirse, cuáles son las recompensas, etc.

<Note> Uses an automation to pull in data from a google sheet. </Note>

<Columns cols={2}>
<Card
    title="Pool Name"
    icon="swimming-pool"
    href="#"
    arrow
  >
    Pool Description
  </Card>

</Columns>
